nodes.context: Political organization and criminal gang of conservative Shia Iraqis in Western Europe, founded by Mohammed Bunia in Germany.
Iraqi Shia militia, former Mahdi Army, whose ideology Al Salam 313 is based on.
A branch of the Iraqi Armed Forces, to which Al Salam 313 has pledged allegiance.
Outlaw motorcycle gang mentioned for comparison by German police.
Outlaw motorcycle gang mentioned for comparison by German police.

edges.evidence_quote: The Salam 313 has members in Central and North Europe and is based on the ideology of the Iraqi Shia militia Sarāyā al-Salām (former Mahdi Army).
edges.context: Al Salam 313 is ideologically based on Sarāyā al-Salām.

edges.evidence_quote: They have pledged allegiance to the Popular Mobilization Forces, a branch of the Iraqi Armed Forces without being under control of the Iraqi government.
edges.context: Al Salam 313 has pledged allegiance to the Popular Mobilization Forces.
